---
title: "Publications"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    collapsed: false
    number_sections: false
    toc_depth: 1
    #code_folding: hide
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(message=FALSE,warning=FALSE, cache=TRUE)
```


# Journal Articles (peer-review) 
Updated on: `r Sys.Date()`

1. Islam, M., Zhang, B., and Managi, S. (2022). The tradeoff between natural capital and other capitals in Pakistan. Sustainability Science (forthcoming). (https://doi.org/10.1007/s11625-022-01143-w)

2. Managi, S., Islam, M., Saito, O. et al. (2022). Valuation of nature and nature’s contributions to people. Sustainability Science, 17, 701-705. (https://doi.org/10.1007/s11625-022-01140-z)

3. Islam, M., and Managi, S. (2021). Valuation of Nature’s Contribution in Ladakh, India: An Inclusive Wealth Method. Sustainability Science, 17, 905-918. (https://doi.org/10.1007/s11625-021-01030-w)

4. N’dri, L., Islam, M., and Kakinaka, M. (2021). ICT and environmental sustainability: Any differences in developing countries? Journal of Cleaner Production, 297, 126642. (https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jclepro.2021.126642)

5. Badamvaanchig, M., Islam, M., and Kakinaka, M. (2021). Pass-through of commodity price to Mongolian stock price: Symmetric or asymmetric? Resources Policy, 70, 101955. (https://doi.org/10.1016/j.resourpol.2020.101955)

6. Hongsakhone, S., Islam, M., and Ichihashi, M. (2021). Producing a village input-output table (VIOT) from household survey data: A case study of a VIOT for a rural village in northern Lao PDR. Journal of Economic Structures, 10, 1-24.  (https://doi.org/10.1186/s40008-020-00231-3)

7. Sharifi, A., Simangan, D., Lee, C. Y., Reyes, S. R. C., Katramiz, T., Josol, J. C. C., & Islam, M. (2021). Climate-induced stressors to peace: A review of recent literature. Environmental Research Letters, 16, 073006.  (https://doi.org/10.1088/1748-9326/abfc08)

8. Simangan, D., Virji, H., Hendrix, C., Islam, M., Kaneko, S., Ma, Y., Mechler, R., Pangotra, P., Peters, K., Sharifi, A. and Shams, S. (2021). A co-designed heuristic guide for investigating the peace-sustainability nexus in the context of global change. Sustainability Science, 16, 1097-1109.  (https://doi.org/10.1007/s11625-021-00970-7)

9. Essandoh, O. K., Islam, M., and Kakinaka, M. (2020). Linking international trade and foreign direct investment to CO2 emissions: Any differences between developed and developing countries? Science of The Total Environment, 712, 136437. (https://doi.org/10.1016/j.scitotenv.2019.136437)

10. Jingyu, W., Yuping B., Yihzong W., Zhihui L., Xiangzheng D., Islam M., and Managi S. (2020). Measuring inclusive wealth of China: Advances in sustainable use of resources. Journal of Environmental Management, 264, 110328.  (https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jenvman.2020.110328)

11. Hotak, S., Islam, M., Kakinaka, M. and Kotani, K. (2020). Carbon emissions and carbon trade balances: International evidence from panel ARDL analysis. Environmental Science and Pollution Research, 27, 24115-24128.  (https://doi.org/10.1007/s11356-020-08478-w)

12. Coulibaly, T., Islam, M., and Managi, S. (2020). The Impacts of climate change and natural disasters on agriculture in African countries. Economics of Disasters and Climate Change, 4, 347-363.  (https://doi.org/10.1007/s41885-019-00057-9)



# Reports (peer-review)
Updated on: `r Sys.Date()`

1. Inclusive Wealth of Pakistan: The Case for Investing in Natural Capital and Restoration (2021). United Nation Environmental Program (UNEP). Available from 
(https://www.unep.org/resources/report/inclusive-wealth-pakistan-case-investing-natural-capital-and-restoration)

# Book chapters
Updated on: `r Sys.Date()`

1. Islam, M., and Managi, S. (2021). Global human capital: View from inclusive wealth. In Measuring Human Capital, Academic Press, Fraumeni, Barbara M. (Ed), (forthcoming). ISBN: 9780128190579 (https://www.elsevier.com/books/measuring-human-capital/fraumeni/978-0-12-819057-9)
